title: lycopodioides doederleinii
intro: Lycopodioides doederleinii, also known as Japanese club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the club moss family (Lycopodiaceae). It is a perennial plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lycopodioides doederleinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, or it can be added to topical creams and ointments for its anti-inflammatory properties.
